query: SELECT edp.id, edp.userId, edp.enabled, edp.frequency, edp.includeHotOnly, edp.includeContacts, edp.includePipelineUpdates, edp.lastSentAt, u.name, u.email FROM email_digest_prefs edp LEFT JOIN users u ON edp.userId = u.id
